This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Fenced frames should inherit features from parent if nothing specified.
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'allowsFeature')"
[FAIL] Fenced frames default feature policies should inherit when using `allow` but should be able to further restrict the policies.
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'allowsFeature')"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
